title: The Central Agricultural University Act, 1992
full_text: The Central Agricultural University Act, 1992 केन्‍द्रीय कृषि विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 1992 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1992-40 Act Number: 40 Enactment Date: 1992-12-26 Act Year: 1992 Short Title: The Central Agricultural University Act, 1992 Hindi Title: केन्‍द्रीय कृषि विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 1992 Long Title: An Act to provide for the establishment and incorporation of a University for the North-Eastern region for the development of agriculture and for the furtherance of the advancement of learning and prosecution of research in agriculture and allied sciences in that region. Ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare Department: Department of Agricultural Research and Education Enforcement Date: 26-01-1993 Notification: 6th January, 1993, vide notification No. S.O. 72(E), dated 25th January, 1993, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Central Agricultural University Act, 1992 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. The University. Section 4. Objects of the University. Section 5. Powers of the University. Section 6. Jurisdiction. Section 7. University open to all classes, castes and creed. Section 8. The Visitor. Section 9. Officers of the University. Section 10. The Chancellor. Section 11. The Vice-Chancellor. Section 12. Deans and Directors. Section 13. The Registrar. Section 14. The Comptroller. Section 15. Other officers. Section 16. Authorities of the University. Section 17. The Board. Section 18. The Academic Council. Section 19. The Finance Committee. Section 20. The Research Programme Committee. Section 21. The Extension Education Advisory Committee. Section 22. The Board of Studies. Section 23. Faculties. Section 24. Other authorities. Section 25. Power to make Statutes. Section 26. Statutes how to be made. Section 27. Power to make Ordinances. Show Related Subordinates Section 28. Regulations. Section 29. Annual report. Section 30. Annual accounts. Section 31. Conditions of service of employees. Section 32. Procedure of appeal and arbitration in disciplinary cases against students. Section 33. Right to appeal. Section 34. Provident and pension funds. Section 35. Disputes as to constitution of University authorities. Section 36. Constitution of Committees. Section 37. Filling of casual vacancies. Section 38. Proceedings of University authorities not invalidated by vacancy. Section 39. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 40. Mode of proof of University records. Section 41. Power to remove difficulties. Section 42. Transitional provisions. Section 43. Statutes, Ordinances and Regulations to be published in the Official Gazette and to be laid before Parliament. Show Related Subordinates Schedule 1.
